productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Brown  Formal Shoes
description: Style NoteStylish and super cool, these formal boots with a pointed toe design from franco leone will add an extra bounce to your steps. With a high quality leather upper and no laces, they are easy to wear and take off. They can also be used as semi-formal boots and will look great with jeans, chinos or even your formal trousers. Product DetailsBrown tapering, pointy-toed boots with a high collar and a zipper closure at medial sideStitch at the seams of the upperUpper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heel and grooves all overMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
